title: BestOfBedrock
description: Using the amazing mod Bedrockify as a basis, this modpack explores the beauty of Bedrock on Java.
body:
![Best of Bedrock Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc5c0c7c4bba6970f502ad6378bcd6ee2dddda73.png)![Bedrockify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de05d9d88d52a8f5c738aadc663b17ad2514e6ca_0.webp)![With Sodium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d2071ac4ee6bd0dfb6c89742a3e0f17dce552f7.png)![With Iris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b713915c98798b532b266f503a52c61aaf2234b8_0.webp) 
---
Best of Bedrock (or BOB) is a modpack based on the amazing mod [Bedrockify](https://modrinth.com/mod/bedrockify) with the addition of other mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions) or even [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).

Its primary use is to offer a modpack playable on lots of hardware with Minecraft Bedrock Features; even on Mac or Linux.

---
No mod in this modpack is owned by the creator of the modpack and if you want to see more about these mods: Check them out.

If any bugs happen while playing with this modpack, please send them here and not to the devs page unless it's asked to.
